meaning: n.[希神]佛里克索斯(Athamas和Nephele之子)
examples: King Athamus of northern Greece had two children, Phrixus and Helle.
The story of Phrixus was well known to Jason and to all the people of Iolcus.
Ino persuaded her credulous husband into believing that his son, Phrixus, was the actual cause of the disaster, and should be sacrificed to Zeus to end it.
